candidate_summary: INADANE-CAST: sacrificial draft model D_wax + discarded distillation dataset M_clay + strict one-pass fine-tune extraction onto frozen pretrained LLM L_silver; two-medium sacrificial pipeline modeled on Tuareg lost-wax silver casting; combines sacrificial draft model + discarded dataset + one-pass extraction discipline.

results_analysis.title: Model Distillation: Teacher-Student Training Guide 2026
results_analysis.note: Dominant KD strategy: teacher generates synthetic dataset, fine-tune student; same pipeline architecture (generate-then-fine-tune) as INADANE-CAST; difference (small generates for large) is direction not mechanism.

results_analysis.title: Knowledge + Dataset Distillation of LLMs (Springer 2025)
results_analysis.note: Dataset distillation produces distilled subsets used for adaptation; matches discarded-mold mechanism.

results_analysis.title: Pedagogically-Inspired Data Synthesis for KD (2602.12172)
results_analysis.note: Pedagogically-designed synthetic data for KD; the generate-data-then-train pattern matches INADANE-CAST's wax->clay->silver pipeline structure.

results_analysis.title: LLM Distillation Demystified
results_analysis.note: Synthetic-data distillation guide; covers the same architectural pattern.

results_analysis.title: Model Distillation Intro (Nebius)
results_analysis.note: Standard KD: teacher generates outputs used to train student; same generate-then-fine-tune architecture.

results_analysis.title: DiDOTS: Knowledge Distillation from LLMs (PETS 2025)
results_analysis.note: KD from LLMs; privacy framing; still same distillation pipeline.

results_analysis.title: Differentially Private KD via Synthetic Text (2403.00932)
results_analysis.note: DP-KD via synthetic text generation; teacher-data-student structure aligns.

results_analysis.title: How to Generate Synthetic Training Data 2026
results_analysis.note: Synthetic dataset generation for LLM fine-tuning; matches discarded-dataset extraction pattern.

verdict_sentence: INADANE-CAST fails novelty: 8/8 results trigger hits (kw>=2 in all 8; sem>=0.7 in all 8; func>=0.7 in 7); the candidate's three components (sacrificial draft model, discarded distillation dataset, one-pass fine-tune extraction) collectively describe standard dataset-distillation/KD pipelines extensively documented in 2025-2026 literature, and the candidate itself concedes the three components are known and merely recombined.
